glosses.ja: 区別する; 見分ける

sentences.target: Je ne distingue rien sans mes lunettes.
sentences.reading: /ʒə nə dis.tɛ̃ɡ ʁjɛ̃ sɑ̃ me ly.nɛt/

translations.fr: Je ne distingue rien sans mes lunettes.
translations.ipa: /ʒə nə dis.tɛ̃ɡ ʁjɛ̃ sɑ̃ me ly.nɛt/
translations.en: I can't make out anything without my glasses.
translations.es: No distingo nada sin mis gafas.
translations.de: Ohne meine Brille erkenne ich nichts.
translations.it: Senza i miei occhiali non distinguo nulla.
translations.ko: 안경 없이는 아무것도 알아볼 수 없어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 没有眼镜我什么也看不清。
translations.ru: Без моих очков я ничего не различаю.
translations.pt: Sem os meus óculos não distingo nada.
translations.he: בלי המשקפיים שלי אני לא מבחין בכלום.
translations.tr: Gözlüğüm olmadan hiçbir şeyi ayırt edemiyorum.
translations.vi: Không có kính, tôi không nhìn rõ được gì.
translations.ar: لا أستطيع تمييز أي شيء بدون نظارتي.
translations.nl: Zonder mijn bril kan ik niets zien.
translations.uk: Без моїх окулярів я нічого не розрізняю.
translations.hu: Szemüveg nélkül semmit sem tudok kivenni.
translations.hi: मेरे चश्मे के बिना मुझे कुछ भी दिखाई नहीं देता।
translations.pl: Bez moich okularów niczego nie rozróżniam.
translations.el: Χωρίς τα γυαλιά μου δεν ξεχωρίζω τίποτα.
translations.nb: Uten brillene mine klarer jeg ikke å skjelne noe.
translations.id: Tanpa kacamata, saya tidak bisa melihat apa pun dengan jelas.
translations.sv: Utan mina glasögon kan jag inte urskilja något.
translations.ro: Fără ochelarii mei nu disting nimic.
translations.da: Uden mine briller kan jeg ikke skelne noget.
translations.ja: 眼鏡がないと何も見分けられません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; the subject of the verb 'distingue'.
Negation particle placed before the verb; here forms a negative construction together with 'rien'.
Main verb in the present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the action of distinguishing.
Negative pronoun meaning 'nothing'; direct object of 'distingue', completing the negation with 'ne'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase of means/condition ('sans mes lunettes').
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, plural form; modifies 'lunettes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'sans'. Typically used in the plural to mean spectacles.

sentences.target: Tu distingues les oiseaux dans les arbres.
sentences.reading: /ty dis.tɛ̃ɡ lez wazo dɑ̃ lez aʁbʁ/

translations.fr: Tu distingues les oiseaux dans les arbres.
translations.ipa: /ty dis.tɛ̃ɡ lez wazo dɑ̃ lez aʁbʁ/
translations.en: You can make out the birds in the trees.
translations.es: Puedes distinguir los pájaros en los árboles.
translations.de: Du erkennst die Vögel in den Bäumen.
translations.it: Riesci a distinguere gli uccelli sugli alberi.
translations.ko: 나무에 있는 새들을 알아볼 수 있어요.
translations.pt: Você consegue distinguir os pássaros nas árvores.
translations.vi: Bạn nhìn ra những con chim trên cây.
translations.nl: Je kunt de vogels in de bomen onderscheiden.
translations.hi: तुम पेड़ों पर पक्षियों को देख लेते हो।
translations.nb: Du klarer å skjelne fuglene i trærne.
translations.id: Kamu bisa melihat burung-burung di pepohonan.
translations.da: Du kan skelne fuglene i træerne.
translations.ja: 木にいる鳥を見分けられる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb in the present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, plural; determines 'oiseaux' as a specific set.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'distingues'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article, plural; modifies 'arbres'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On n’arrive pas à distinguer la route.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ naʁiv pa a dis.tɛ̃ɡe la ʁut/

translations.fr: On n’arrive pas à distinguer la route.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ naʁiv pa a dis.tɛ̃ɡe la ʁut/
translations.en: We can't make out the road.
translations.de: Wir können die Straße nicht erkennen.
translations.it: Non riusciamo a distinguere la strada.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không nhìn rõ con đường.
translations.nl: We kunnen de weg niet zien.
translations.hi: हम सड़क को देख नहीं पा रहे हैं।
translations.el: Δεν μπορούμε να ξεχωρίσουμε τον δρόμο.
translations.ja: 道が見分けられません。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (often equivalent to 'we'); subject of the verb.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'arriver'; carries the elided negative clitic 'ne' (n’) attached before the verb; part of a 'ne … pas' negation.
Negative adverb completing the 'ne … pas' negation.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'arrive à', indicating the action that one fails to manage.
Definite article, feminine singular; modifies 'route'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the infinitive 'distinguer'.

sentences.target: Nous distinguons bien les deux modèles.

translations.fr: Nous distinguons bien les deux modèles.
translations.en: We can clearly tell the two models apart.
translations.de: Wir können die beiden Modelle gut auseinanderhalten.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们能清楚地区分这两个型号。
translations.yue: 我哋清楚分得出呢兩個型號。
translations.ru: Мы хорошо различаем эти две модели.
translations.he: אנחנו מבחינים היטב בין שני הדגמים.
translations.tr: İki modeli gayet iyi ayırt ediyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi phân biệt rõ hai mẫu này.
translations.nl: We houden de twee modellen goed uit elkaar.
translations.uk: Ми добре розрізняємо ці дві моделі.
translations.hi: हम दोनों मॉडलों को साफ़-साफ़ अलग पहचान लेते हैं।
translations.nb: Vi skiller godt mellom de to modellene.
translations.id: Kami dapat membedakan dengan jelas kedua model itu.
translations.sv: Vi kan tydligt skilja på de två modellerna.
translations.da: Vi kan tydeligt skelne mellem de to modeller.
translations.ja: 私たちはその二つのモデルをはっきり見分けられます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb in the present indicative, 1st person plural.
Adverb of manner/degree modifying the verb; indicates clarity or ease ('clearly/well').
Definite article, plural; modifies 'modèles'.
Cardinal number functioning as a determiner; quantifies 'modèles'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'distinguons'.

app_payload.word_ja: 区別する; 見分ける
jp: Je ne distingue rien sans mes lunettes.
Tu distingues les oiseaux dans les arbres.
On n’arrive pas à distinguer la route.
Nous distinguons bien les deux modèles.
fu: /ʒə nə dis.tɛ̃ɡ ʁjɛ̃ sɑ̃ me ly.nɛt/
/ty dis.tɛ̃ɡ lez wazo dɑ̃ lez aʁbʁ/
/ɔ̃ naʁiv pa a dis.tɛ̃ɡe la ʁut/
fr: Je ne distingue rien sans mes lunettes.
Tu distingues les oiseaux dans les arbres.
On n’arrive pas à distinguer la route.
Nous distinguons bien les deux modèles.
ipa: /ʒə nə dis.tɛ̃ɡ ʁjɛ̃ sɑ̃ me ly.nɛt/
/ty dis.tɛ̃ɡ lez wazo dɑ̃ lez aʁbʁ/
/ɔ̃ naʁiv pa a dis.tɛ̃ɡe la ʁut/
en: I can't make out anything without my glasses.
You can make out the birds in the trees.
We can't make out the road.
We can clearly tell the two models apart.
